products.name: E1s 560HP Tractor
products.description: Premium heavy-duty long-haul tractor with the powerful Cummins Z14EVIE 560 engine. Designed for maximum fuel efficiency, driver comfort, and reliability over extended distances. Features advanced aerodynamics and intelligent fleet management systems.

products.name: Z3 520HP Tractor
products.description: Next-generation tractor equipped with Cummins M13 520 engine. Features state-of-the-art driver assistance systems, enhanced cabin comfort, and superior fuel economy. Built for modern fleet operations demanding the highest standards.

products.name: X3s 420HP Tractor
products.description: Versatile tractor with Cummins ISME 420 30 engine offering excellent power-to-weight ratio. Ideal for regional and inter-city transport with balanced performance, reliability, and operating economy.

products.name: E3 340HP Tractor
products.description: Reliable medium tractor powered by Yuchai YC6MK340-33 engine. Cost-effective solution for medium-distance transport with proven durability, easy maintenance, and competitive fuel consumption.

products.name: X1s 520HP Tractor
products.description: Flagship premium tractor representing the pinnacle of SAGMOTO engineering. Luxury cabin, advanced connectivity features, and exceptional performance make this the choice for demanding fleet operators.

products.name: X1s 450HP Dump Truck
products.description: Heavy-duty mining dump truck built on a reinforced chassis with high-strength steel dump body. Powered by Cummins ISME 450, engineered for extreme operating conditions with maximum payload capacity.

products.name: X3s 400HP Dump Truck
products.description: Standard dump truck with Yuchai YC6MK400-33 reliable powertrain. Versatile design for construction, earthmoving, and infrastructure projects with balanced performance and durability.

products.name: E3 400HP Dump Truck
products.description: Medium dump truck with excellent maneuverability for urban construction sites. Combines adequate power with fuel-efficient operation for cost-effective earthmoving applications.

products.name: X6s 285HP Dump Truck
products.description: Light dump truck powered by efficient Cummins ISD 285. Compact design with impressive payload capacity, ideal for urban construction and smaller-scale earthmoving projects.

products.name: X9 140HP Dump Truck
products.description: Compact dump truck designed for tight urban spaces and light earthmoving tasks. Nimble, efficient, and easy to operate in confined construction environments.

products.name: X7 160HP Mini Dump Truck
products.description: Mini dump truck for small-scale construction, landscaping, and agricultural use. Compact dimensions with proven Yuchai reliability.

products.name: X3s 345HP Cargo Truck
products.description: Heavy-duty cargo truck with spacious cargo bed and powerful Cummins ISME 345 engine. Designed for long-distance freight transport with emphasis on reliability and cargo protection.

products.name: E3 340HP Cargo Truck
products.description: Versatile medium cargo truck balancing payload and economy. Yuchai powertrain ensures reliable operation for regional distribution and logistics applications.

products.name: X6s 210HP Cargo Truck
products.description: Light cargo truck with Cummins power, ideal for urban distribution and last-mile delivery. Compact dimensions with generous cargo space and excellent fuel efficiency.

products.name: X6 180HP Cargo Truck
products.description: Reliable standard cargo truck with Yuchai YC6J180 engine. Proven platform for general freight transport with competitive total cost of ownership.

products.name: X9 90HP Cargo Truck
products.description: Compact cargo truck for narrow urban streets and light goods delivery. Excellent maneuverability with low operating costs for city logistics.

products.name: X7 160HP Cargo Truck
products.description: Light cargo truck combining compact dimensions with strong 160HP performance. Versatile platform for diverse light transport applications.

products.name: E9 140HP Cargo Truck
products.description: Efficient light cargo truck with proven Cummins B140 engine. Excellent choice for businesses seeking reliability and low operating expenses.

products.name: X9 140HP Street Sweeper
products.description: Efficient street sweeper with high-capacity debris collection system. Designed for urban road maintenance with powerful sweeping and dust suppression capabilities.

products.name: X7 160HP Tow Truck
products.description: Reliable recovery vehicle equipped with heavy-duty winch and towing platform. Essential for roadside assistance and disabled vehicle transport operations.

products.name: X7s 140HP Aerial Platform
products.description: Stable aerial work platform for electrical line maintenance, tree trimming, signage installation, and elevated construction tasks. Safety-focused design with stabilized outriggers.

products.name: X9s 140HP Municipal Vehicle
products.description: Versatile municipal service platform configurable for waste collection, water tanking, road maintenance, and various urban service applications.

products.name: X3s 385HP Mixer Truck
products.description: Heavy-duty concrete mixer truck with large drum capacity and reliable hydraulic system. Built for continuous operation on major construction sites with minimal downtime.

products.name: E3 375HP Mixer Truck
products.description: Standard concrete mixer with proven Yuchai powertrain. Efficient drum mixing technology ensures consistent concrete quality for medium to large construction projects.

products.name: X9 140HP Mixer Truck
products.description: Compact concrete mixer ideal for small-scale construction, renovation projects, and sites with restricted access. Nimble and cost-effective mixing solution.

products.name: i9 120HP EV Cargo Truck
products.description: Pure electric light truck with 120HP electric motor delivering instant torque. Long-range battery with fast DC charging capability. Zero-emission solution for sustainable urban logistics and last-mile delivery.

products.name: i9 Lite EV
products.description: Compact electric vehicle designed for urban micro-logistics. Tight turning radius, agile maneuverability, and whisper-quiet operation make it perfect for city centers and residential areas.
